item.title: Seven engineers in India have lost their jobs for building a highway bridge with a 90-degree turn. And the construction company has been blacklisted. Authorities spent $2.3 million on the bridge. Now everything needs to be rebuilt. ( video )
item.description: Seven engineers in India have lost their jobs for building a highway bridge with a 90-degree turn. And the construction company has been blacklisted. Authorities spent $2.3 million on the bridge. Now everything needs to be rebuilt.
